roasting_comments: This command has more complexity factors (27) than most enterprise architectures

final_savage_assessment.final_roast: These commands are the software equivalent of using a NASA rocket to order pizza. Technically impressive, works sometimes, completely misses the point of the original requirement. The fact that you have RULES about simplicity while building 40-complexity-point commands is peak software development irony. Fix it.
